headline: UPS (NYSE:UPS) Is Spending $48 Million On Cold Chain While Remaking UK Deliveries
summary: UPS (NYSE:UPS) is committing US$48 million to build 27 temperature-controlled facilities worldwide for cold-chain logistics in healthcare. The expansion targets biological drugs and complex therapies that require tightly managed transport and storage conditions. In the UK, UPS plans a major shift in last-mile delivery by replacing thousands of employee drivers with independent contractors. Together, these moves reflect a material change in UPS’s operating model across both healthcare...
